Here is the list of signs and their scores:

7. Libra - 8/10 - Librans are diplomatic and social, with a natural ability to balance opposing forces and keep the peace.
8. Scorpio - 9/10 - Scorpios are intense and passionate, with a strong sense of intuition and an ability to uncover hidden truths.
9. Sagittarius - 7/10 - Sagittarians are optimistic and adventurous, with a love of exploration and self-discovery.
10. Capricorn - 6/10 - Capricorns can be serious and reserved, but also disciplined and responsible.

12. Pisces - 9/10 - Pisceians are compassionate and imaginative, with a strong connection to their intuition and the spiritual realm.
